title: kohleria eriantha
intro: Kohleria eriantha, also known as the "Piggyback Plant", is a low-maintenance, flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Kohleria eriantha include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or topical treatment.
